amendments.am_title: Kandyan Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 34 of 1954
amendments.summary: Set appointed date (1954-08-01) for commencement of Kandyan Marriage and Divorce Act.

amendments.am_title: Muslim Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 31 of 1954
amendments.summary: Set appointed date (1954-08-01) for commencement of Muslim Marriage and Divorce Act; established registration framework.

amendments.am_title: Muslim Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 1 of 1965
amendments.summary: Transferred appointment powers for Quazis and Registrars from Minister to Judicial Service Commission; added maintenance for illegitimate children under Muslim law.

amendments.am_title: Muslim Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 5 of 1965
amendments.summary: Added procedure for replacement of lost counterfoil/duplicate registration entries.

amendments.am_title: Muslim Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 32 of 1969
amendments.summary: Enhanced powers of Judicial Service Commission over Quazis; allowed transfer of proceedings between Quazis.
General Marriages: Introduced free copy to female party (s35A); changed fee payment from stamp to receipt; amended solemnization, registration, and certificate procedures.
amendments.section_title: Copy of registration entry to be issued free

amendments.summary: General Marriages: Clarified roles of Registrar-General and Deputy; updated definitions in s64.

amendments.am_title: Kandyan Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 19 of 1995
amendments.summary: Raised lawful age of marriage to 18 years for both sexes in Kandyan marriages (amended s4 and s66).

amendments.am_title: Kandyan Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 39 of 2006
amendments.summary: Added disqualification criteria for Kandyan Registrars (MPs, PC members, local authority members, paid state officers).
amendments.section_title: Appointment of Registrars of Kandyan Marriages

amendments.am_title: Muslim Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 40 of 2006
amendments.summary: Added disqualification criteria for Muslim Marriage Registrars (MPs, PC members, local authority members, paid state officers).

amendments.am_title: Kandyan Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 23 of 2013
amendments.summary: Replaced stamp-based fee with receipt-based payment for Kandyan marriage registration (s18, s19).
amendments.section_title: Issue of certificates in respect of Kandyan marriages

amendments.am_title: Muslim Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 24 of 2013
amendments.summary: Bridegroom to pay registration fee via receipt (not stamp); retroactive validation of past registrations.

amendments.am_title: Kandyan Marriage and Divorce (Amendment) Act, No. 37 of 2022
amendments.summary: Repealed entire Part II (Sections 8–15) — abolished parental/minor consent regime; simplified objection process to 'interested persons' only; removed 'consent' from proof exemption (s29).
amendments.section_title: Consent required to marriage of minor

amendments.summary: Jaffna Tesawalamai: Amended property rights of married women; defined 'thediatheddam' and its devolution; clarified separate estate rules.
amendments.section_title: Property of a wife acquired during or before marriage to remain her separate property
